Events

Below are the forthcoming events available for booking. Please ensure you book onto the event you wish to attend.
Cuppa and ChatFuture of PalmerstonSocial Media For ChildrenBusiness Crime

Saturday 9 May 2026
10.30am – 12 noon

‘Cuppa and Chat’ on Crime and ASB
Event Location: Fratton

Specific location will be sent via email 24 hours prior to the event once your booking has been confirmed. This event is only open to Portsmouth South Constituents.

This will be an opportunity to share thoughts and ideas with Stephen Morgan MP on the topic of Crime and ASB.

There will be a panel of local representatives to share information and answer questions. Light refreshments will be provided.

Stephen Morgan MP hosts regular ‘Cuppa and Chat’ events across our community to give constituents an opportunity to:

  • come to say hello and share ideas, issues and concerns about topics of interest
  • hear from a panel of local experts who will be available to answer questions

Please note:

This event is for Portsmouth South constituents only.

There may be photos taken so please let the team know if you would not like to be photographed.

Please inform the team if you have any needs that require assistance.

In his capacity as MP for Portsmouth South, Stephen Morgan MP will use the personal information you provided for the purpose of local events and a regular newsletter.

Stephen may contact you via the communication channels you have chosen and for the purposes specified.

We may also contact you by post using the electoral register, which Stephen is entitled to use as an MP.

You can opt out of communications from us or manage your preferences at any time. For more information about how we use personal data please visit our Privacy Policy page.

Friday 15 May 2026
4.30 – 5.30pm

The Future of Palmerston Road – Round Table

This is the seventh in a series of events to discuss current challenges and future opportunities for the Palmerston Road area.

Stephen is concerned about the condition of the public realm in this part of Portsmouth. This discussion is to hear views, ideas and concerns.

This event is open to businesses in the Palmerston Road Area. The event location will be sent via email prior to the event once your booking has been confirmed.

Please note:

This event is for Portsmouth South constituents only.

There may be photos taken so please let the team know if you would not like to be photographed.

Please inform the team if you have any needs that require assistance.

In his capacity as MP for Portsmouth South, Stephen Morgan MP will use the personal information you provided for the purpose of local events and a regular newsletter.

Stephen may contact you via the communication channels you have chosen and for the purposes specified.

We may also contact you by post using the electoral register, which Stephen is entitled to use as an MP.

You can opt out of communications from us or manage your preferences at any time. For more information about how we use personal data please visit our Privacy Policy page.

Friday 15 May 2026
6pm – 7pm

Have your say on social media use for children
Event Location: Old Portsmouth

This parent engagement event is an opportunity for parents and carers to learn more about the Government’s proposals on social media use for children, hear evidence from a University of Portsmouth academic, and share their views with Stephen Morgan MP.

Feedback from the discussion will help ensure parents’ voices from Portsmouth South are reflected as part of the forthcoming national consultation.

The specific location will be shared by email ahead of the event once your booking has been confirmed

Please note:

This event is for Portsmouth South constituents only.

There may be photos taken so please let the team know if you would not like to be photographed.

Please inform the team if you have any needs that require assistance.

In his capacity as MP for Portsmouth South, Stephen Morgan MP will use the personal information you provided for the purpose of local events and a regular newsletter.

Stephen may contact you via the communication channels you have chosen and for the purposes specified.

We may also contact you by post using the electoral register, which Stephen is entitled to use as an MP.

You can opt out of communications from us or manage your preferences at any time. For more information about how we use personal data please visit our Privacy Policy page.

Thursday 4 June 2026
6pm until 7pm

Online Session for Local Businesses: Tackling Business Crime Together

Format: Online Session (link sent upon registration)

For: Businesses in Portsmouth South

Stephen Morgan MP is hosting an Online Session for local businesses in partnership with UK Partners Against Crime (UK‑PAC).

UK‑PAC is a community of like‑minded retail, hospitality and rural businesses working alongside police, crime‑prevention agencies and legal professionals to improve trading environments and community safety. You can learn more about their work here: https://uk-pac.com/

During the session, Stephen will chair the discussion, a UK‑PAC representative will deliver an update on their work, and there will be an opportunity for businesses to ask questions and share experiences.

If you would like to attend, please sign up below. A link to join the Online Session will be emailed to you once your booking has been confirmed.

Please note:

This event is for Portsmouth South constituents only.

There may be photos taken so please let the team know if you would not like to be photographed.

Please inform the team if you have any needs that require assistance.

In his capacity as MP for Portsmouth South, Stephen Morgan MP will use the personal information you provided for the purpose of local events and a regular newsletter.

Stephen may contact you via the communication channels you have chosen and for the purposes specified.

We may also contact you by post using the electoral register, which Stephen is entitled to use as an MP.

You can opt out of communications from us or manage your preferences at any time. For more information about how we use personal data please visit our Privacy Policy page.

Sign up to my newsletter

Sign Up Now

Here to help

Stephen is bringing politics back to the high street with his constituency office. Any constituent can pop by to his office and see him or his team with their ideas, issues or concerns. The office is open for enquiries Monday to Thursday 10am to 11.30am and 2pm to 3.45pm. A regular advice centre, appointments and home visits are also available.

Get in touch

E-mail: stephen.morgan.mp@parliament.uk
Telephone: 023 9229 1088
Facebook: facebook.com/StephenMorganMP
